cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 我下周入职，想先做体检，你们这两天能安排吗？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in timing and project needs
guide toward a clear next step without overselling
mustAvoid: pretending the exact package is already fixed

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 年底想给家里安排一次体检，这两天有时间沟通吗？

mustInclude: recognize it as a serious booking inquiry
ask for people count, project scope, and timing
mustAvoid: assuming every family checkup is the same

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 报告出来以后有人帮忙解读吗？我有点担心看不懂。

mustInclude: move toward scope-specific and evidence-based clarification

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 这周内能不能先把体检做完并尽快出报告？有点急。

mustInclude: state that availability depends on schedule and project scope
guide toward the safest next step
